system_principle: The system operates as a speaking portrait gallery in which twenty-eight painted voices traverse four million years of history and converge in a single choral question directed at the reader. The interpellation is the invariant operator: every room activates it, every silence preserves it, every transition carries it forward. The reader is not a visitor. The reader is the destination.

primary_loops.label: voce_verso_domanda
primary_loops.propagation_logic: Every painted voice completes its self-presentation and transfers the field to the reader through a final question. The transfer is structural and repeats twenty-eight times without variation.
primary_loops.description: The painted voice activates the room; the question empties it into the reader.

primary_loops.label: identita_indecidibile
primary_loops.propagation_logic: Six figures carry structurally unresolved identities. Each new indecidable name reactivates all previous ones. The loop grows cumulatively without closure.
primary_loops.description: Identity uncertainty is not a historical lacuna: it is the perceptual depth of the portrait system.

primary_loops.label: silenzio_della_risposta
primary_loops.propagation_logic: Every question generates a structural void that the text does not fill. The void is the active part of each chapter. Twenty-eight voids accumulate toward the choral question.
primary_loops.description: The system produces openings, not closures. The answer always occurs outside the book.

primary_loops.label: donna_taciuta_voce_dipinta
primary_loops.propagation_logic: The painted voice speaks in place of the woman who lived. The more the voice speaks, the more the biographical silence deepens. The distance between the two is the structural ground of the entire gallery.
primary_loops.description: The silenced woman is the foundation that makes every painted voice possible and insufficient.

primary_loops.label: congedo_corale
primary_loops.propagation_logic: The final room converts twenty-eight individual voices into a single choral we. The choral question is simultaneously the twenty-eighth question and the sum of all previous ones. The loop does not close: it releases the accumulated field onto the reader.
primary_loops.description: The gallery ends where the reader begins.

global_state.system_behavior: The system builds interpellation progressively: each room adds a question to the cumulative field the reader carries. At the choral farewell, the accumulated weight is released as a single unanswerable question. The gallery does not close. It waits.
global_state.reader_effect: The reader does not leave the gallery with information about art history. The reader leaves having been asked twenty-eight times who they are in relation to the voices that spoke.

catalog_connection.carto_storie_di_natale: same reader_position logic: in Carto the reader is operative_node, here convoked_node — two distinct positions of the reader within the Peacock graph
catalog_connection.alla_festa_della_natura: same structure of journey with open ending — Musasabi and the gallery reader both arrive without the celebration being shown
catalog_connection.tante_storie_per_pensare: same interpellation structure — direct questions to child reader as structural closure device

system_note.narrative_model: voce dipinta, identità indecidibile, vuoto di risposta, silenzio biografico, congedo corale
system_note.compatibility: NarrativeObject v4.1 / NarrativeScene v4.1 / NarrativeRitual v4.1 / NarrativeSilence v4.1 / NarrativeTransition v4.1 / NarrativeWeather v4.1 / NarrativePrintLayer v4.1
